user.title: Connect to Panda Breath
user.description: Enter the hostname or IP address of your Panda Breath device.

discovery_confirm.title: Panda Breath found
discovery_confirm.description: A Panda Breath device was found at `{host}`. Do you want to add it?

error.cannot_connect: Cannot connect to the device. Check the hostname/IP and make sure the device is on the same network.
